_comment: Non-secret config for the remote Execution Engine. The API key is NEVER stored here; it must live in the User environment variable AIROUTER_API_KEY. Update via: [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable('AIROUTER_API_KEY', '<new-key>', 'User')

models.notes: Primary coding engine for complex multi-file work. Routed to ONLY after the local ensemble has exhausted its capability (see AGENTS.md > Token discipline > rule 7).
